tools.name: LockBit
tools.evidence_snippet: LockBit 3.0 actors obtain and abuse credentials of existing accounts as a means of gaining initial access.

tools.name: Stealbit
tools.evidence_snippet: Exfiltration Technique Title ID Use Exfiltration TA0010 LockBit 3.0 uses Stealbit, a custom exfiltration tool first used with LockBit 2.0, to steal data from a target network.

tools.name: rclone
tools.evidence_snippet: Exfiltration Over Web Service T1567 LockBit 3.0 actors use (1) rclone, an open source command line cloud storage manager to exfiltrate and (2) MEGA, a publicly available file sharing service for data exfiltration.

tools.name: MEGA
tools.evidence_snippet: Exfiltration Over Web Service T1567 LockBit 3.0 actors use (1) rclone, an open source command line cloud storage manager to exfiltrate and (2) MEGA, a publicly available file sharing service for data exfiltration.

tools.name: FileZilla
tools.evidence_snippet: Application Layer Protocol: File Transfer Protocols T1071.002 LockBit 3.0 uses FileZilla for C2.

tools.name: Plink
tools.evidence_snippet: Protocol Tunnel T1572 LockBit 3.0 uses Plink to automate SSH actions on Windows.

cves.evidence_snippet: Guardrails: Environmental Keying T1480.001 LockBit 3.0 will only decrypt the main component or continue to decrypt and/or decompress data if the correct password is entered.
Credential Access Technique Title ID Use OS Credential Dumping: LSASS Memory T1003.001 LockBit 3.0 uses Microsoft Sysinternals ProDump to dump the contents of LSASS.exe.

ttps.evidence_snippet: Use Valid Accounts T1078 LockBit 3.0 actors obtain and abuse credentials of existing accounts as a means of gaining initial access.
Exploit External Remote Services T1133 LockBit 3.0 actors exploit RDP to gain access to victim networks.
Drive-by Compromise T1189 LockBit 3.0 actors gain access to a system through a user visiting a website over the normal course of browsing.
Server Software Component Service Misconfiguration T1190 LockBit 3.0 actors gain access to a system through a misconfigured server software component.
